c74object.name: bounce~
c74object.digest: Bounces stems from a polybuffer~ into a single buffer~ with dynamic fades and optimized processing
c74object.description: The `bounce~` object takes two mandatory arguments: the name of an external `polybuffer~` containing stem buffers, and the name of an external `buffer~` for the final product. Additionally, it requires an external `buffer~` named `stats` to be present in the patcher. When it receives a `bang`, it looks up index 1 (zero-based) of the `stats` buffer to determine the end of the audio in milliseconds. This value is used to bound all processing steps, including normalization, summation, and channel duplication, ensuring that no operations are performed beyond the required duration. It first normalizes any stem buffers in the `polybuffer~` (up to the specified end point) that exceed the [-1, 1] range to a maximum absolute value of 0.9999999. It then sums the first channel of each stem buffer into the first channel of the destination buffer with dynamic fades. A dynamic fade-in is applied at the beginning, and a dynamic fade-out is applied starting from the specified time before the end of the audio (as defined by the `stats` buffer). Finally, it copies the content of the first channel of the destination buffer to all its other channels (up to the end point) and sends a `bang` when finished.

inlet.description: A bang in the first inlet triggers the normalization and bouncing process.

outlet.description: Sends a bang when the bounce process is complete.
Outputs diagnostic information when the log attribute is enabled.

objarg.name: polybuffer_prefix
objarg.digest: Prefix of the polybuffer~ to reference

objarg.name: destination_buffer
objarg.digest: Name of the destination buffer~ to reference

method.name: bang
method.description: Triggers normalization of stem buffers and summing into the destination buffer with dynamic fades, using the `stats` buffer to define the processing limit.

method.name: log
method.description: Sets the `log` attribute in real time. Enables verbose logging of normalization events, buffer attachments, and process milestones.

method.name: normalize
method.description: Sets the `normalize` attribute in real time. If set to a non-zero value, the object will normalize the final product buffer to this peak absolute amplitude.

method.name: low
method.description: Sets the `low` attribute in real time. The minimum ramp time for the dynamic crossfade module (default: 22.653 ms).

method.name: high
method.description: Sets the `high` attribute in real time. The maximum ramp time for the dynamic crossfade module (default: 4999.0 ms).

method.name: async
method.description: Sets the `async` attribute in real time. When enabled (1), the bounce process runs in a background thread.

attribute.name: log
attribute.description: Enables verbose logging of normalization events, buffer attachments, and process milestones.

attribute.name: normalize
attribute.description: If set to a non-zero value, the object will normalize the final product buffer to this peak absolute amplitude before finishing.

attribute.name: low
attribute.description: The minimum ramp time for the dynamic crossfade module (default: 22.653 ms).

attribute.name: high
attribute.description: The maximum ramp time for the dynamic crossfade module (default: 4999.0 ms). This also determines how many milliseconds before the end of the audio (defined by the `stats` buffer) the fade-out begins.

attribute.name: async
attribute.description: When enabled (1), the bounce process runs in a background thread to avoid stalling the Main thread.
